title: Burgundy Satin Wired Ribbon, 63mm X Continuous 9M Luxury Double Faced Satin Wire Edge Ribbon for Gift Wrapping, Wreaths, Flower Bouquet, Wedding Decorations, Home Decor
availability_text: This item will be released on December 8, 2025.
features: Material: The ribbon is made of premium polyester satin with good softness, glossy and shiny luxury surface; Sewn wire edged ribbon allows you to bend and shape your creations to decorate with ease
Size: Wired satin ribbon 2.5 inch wide and continuous 10 yards(30 feet ) length, 1 Roll per package, convenient for you to use and store

Design: Burgundy ribbon crafted from glossy and shiny elegant surface satin texture with the same double-faced backing, wired edges, great for making bows for your wreath, centerpiece, door hanger, lantern, gift wrap and other

Application: This satin ribbon would be a great way to decorate your gifts and home for the all season; Prefect for wreaths, gift wrapping, basket decor, garlands, staircases, bows, Christmas tree, floral arrangement, home décor and any craft you can think of
Kryvus ribbons: Available in a wide range of colors, sizes, and types, our ribbons will satisfy your endless creative, no matter what you're using them for
description: Kryvus Premium Wired Satin Ribbon Our 2.5-inch burgundy wired satin ribbon combines elegance with functionality. The double-faced polyester satin features a uniform glossy finish on both sides, with flexible wired edges that hold shape while remaining easy to manipulate. Key Features: Material: 100% polyester satin with identical sheen on front and back Structure: Sewn-in wire edges for shaping and structure Dimensions: 2.5 inches wide x 10 yards continuous length per roll Color: Vibrant light blue maintained throughout entire length Recommended Uses: Create voluminous gift bows and decorative accents Design wedding bouquets and ceremony decorations Craft seasonal wreaths for Christmas and other holidays Embellish floral arrangements and home decor projects Quality Assurance: Each ribbon is inspected for: Consistent color saturation Smooth wire concealment Fray-resistant edges Care Instructions: Store flat to maintain shape Use sharp scissors for clean cuts May be spot cleaned with damp cloth Package Includes: 1 roll of burgundy wired satin ribbon (2.5" x 10 yards)
